product.name: A-Premium CV Axle Shaft Assembly Compatible with Toyota Corolla 2003-2018, Matrix 2003-2013 & Pontiac Vibe 2003-2010, L4 1.8L, Front Right Passenger Side
features: [Vehicle Fitment-1]: Compatible with Toyota Corolla 2003-2008 L4 1.8L (5 Speed Manual Transmission), Corolla 2009-2018 L4 1.8L, Matrix 2003-2006 L4 1.8L (Base FWD/XR FWD models with Manual Transmission), Matrix 2007-2008 L4 1.8L (FWD models with 5 Speed Manual Transmission), Matrix 2009-2013 L4 1.8L (Built Before 10/2012)
[Vehicle Fitment-2]: Compatible with Pontiac Vibe 2003-2006 L4 1.8L (FWD models with Manual Transmission), Vibe 2007-2008 L4 1.8L (Manual Transmission), Vibe 2009-2010 L4 1.8L

[Specifications]: ① Location: Front Right (Passenger Side); ② ABS Ring Included: Yes; ③ Axle Nut Included: Yes; ④ Spindle Nut Thread Size: M22 x 1.5; ⑤ Compressed Length: 36.34 inch; ⑥ Input Shaft Spline Count: 20; ⑦ Output Shaft Spline Count: 26

[Buy with Confidence]: A-Premium offers a one-year unlimited-mileage guarantee on our meticulously crafted CV axles. We offer a wide variety of automotive accessory categories, ensuring that you can hit the road with peace of mind
